research_question: On the trainval-only snapshot that excludes the frozen 2022-2025 test window by construction, which one of three orthogonal Alpha158 standalone keepers cord30, vsumd60, and imxd5 can beat the frozen v18 working reference under a predeclared validation window and a single fixed boolean promotion rule?

time_partition_plan.note: The fixed test window 2022-01 to 2025-12 is excluded by construction through the trainval-only snapshot.

confirmatory_shortlist_rationale.selection_source: restricted to Alpha158 exact standalone-positive keepers with lower redundancy on the trainval-only panels
excluded_close_substitutes: corr cluster retained as reserve because corr20 vs cord30 pooled_corr=0.5100390670
vma/vstd cluster retained as reserve because vma60 vs vstd60 pooled_corr=0.9864553601

reference_contract.score_family_rule: Use the existing v18 working reference operational contract with the same underlying two-signal score family as price_volume_v16_remove_trend_consistency, then preserve the live v18 portfolio extraction and refresh semantics for this trainval-only confirmatory baseline run.
reference_contract.note: The reference is executed only as a frozen comparator and is not part of the confirmatory shortlist count.

decision_rule.boolean_expression: (validation_annual_relative_return - reference_validation_annual_relative_return > 0.005) AND (validation_relative_ir - reference_validation_relative_ir > 0.05) AND (validation_max_drawdown - reference_validation_max_drawdown >= -0.05) AND (validation_avg_turnover_daily - reference_validation_avg_turnover_daily <= 0.02) AND (validation_avg_invested_weight >= 0.15)
decision_rule.pass_interpretation: A candidate passes only if it beats the frozen v18 reference on return and IR, does not materially worsen drawdown or turnover, and maintains minimum invested weight.

frozen_dimensions.score_family_cardinality: single signal only for shortlisted candidates

disallowed_changes: Do not access or regenerate any snapshot that contains the 2022-2025 frozen test window.
Do not change the shortlist membership after registration.
Do not change candidate raw fields, ranking directions, or candidate names after registration.
Do not add overlays, family blends, or multi-signal combinations inside this round.
Do not change TopK width, benchmark, execution semantics, or cost semantics.
Do not change the validation window or the boolean promotion rule after registration.
notes: This is the first confirmatory round after rebuilding trainval-only research panels that exclude the frozen test window by construction.
The shortlist is intentionally capped at three candidates to respect confirmatory budget discipline.
The baseline reference run is allowed through registry guardrails only as the preregistered frozen comparator for this round.
